---
pagetitle: "Munich RSE"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div>
    <h2 class="mb-0" style="border-bottom: none;">
        <span class="fw-bold">Munich RSE</span>
        <span class="fw-light"> Community</span>
    </h2>
</div>
<div class="container px-0 mb-3">
    <div class="row align-items-center">
        <div class="col-md-9 p-0">
            <p style="line-height: 1.6; text-align: justify;">
                    Munich RSE is the place to meet other research software engineers in Munich.
                    We aim for a meeting every two months, followed by dinner and networking.
                    Our meetings include short talks about anything related to RSE
                    (research data management, software development, teaching/training, and more),
                    as well as open discussions on topics brought into the agenda by any attendee.
            </p>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 text-center">
            <img src="images/rse.png" class="img-fluid" style="max-height:150px;" alt="Munich RSE logo">
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="container px-0">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
        Get Involved
    </h4>
    <p style="line-height: 1.6;" class="mb-2">
        For questions regarding the group, feel free to contact, for example:
    </p>
    <ul class="mt-0 osc-init-organizer-list">
        <li>
            <a href="https://www.mpdl.mpg.de/en/about-us/team.html" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Larissa Leiminger
            </a>, MPDL
        </li>
        <li>
            <a href="https://www.ub.uni-muenchen.de/ueber-die-ub/kontakt/personen/spenger/index.html" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Martin Spenger
            </a>, LMU
        </li>
        <li>
            <a href="https://www.cs.cit.tum.de/en/sccs/people/gerasimos-chourdakis/" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Gerasimos Chourdakis
            </a>, Univ. Stuttgart / TUM
        </li>
    </ul>
    <p style="line-height: 1.6;" class="mb-3">
        Find out when our next meeting is by visiting our website below, and subscribe to our mailing list to get the latest updates on our activities and events.
    </p>
    <div class="d-flex gap-3 align-items-center flex-wrap justify-content-center mt-3">
        <a href="https://matrix.to/#/#derse-chapter-muc:gitter.im" class="btn btn-primary osc-init-contact-btn">
          <i class="bi bi-globe"></i>
            Visit Website
        </a>
        <a href="https://lists.lrz.de/mailman/listinfo/rse" class="btn btn-outline-primary osc-init-contact-btn" rel="noopener">
            <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> 
            Join Mailing list
        </a>
    </div>

</div>
```
